name: MARCUS CORP
summary: . General We are engaged primarily in two business segments: movie theatres and hotels and resorts. As of December31, 2025, our theatre operations included 78 movie theatres with 985 screens throughout 17 states (Wisconsin, Illinois, Iowa, Minnesota, Missouri, Nebraska, North Dakota, Ohio, Arkansas, Colorado, Georgia, Kentucky, Louisiana, New York, Pennsylvania, Texas and Virginia), including one movie theatre with 14 screens in Minnesota owned by a third party and managed by us.
